notes: Compound noun: Drachen (dragon) + Frucht (fruit). Refers to the tropical fruit from cactus plants, originally from Central America.

sentences.german: Die Drachenfrucht hat eine leuchtend rosa Schale und weißes Fruchtfleisch.
sentences.english: The dragon fruit has a bright pink skin and white flesh.

sentences.german: Im Supermarkt kann man manchmal frische Drachenfrüchte kaufen.
sentences.english: In the supermarket you can sometimes buy fresh dragon fruits.
